enrichment.short_description: X (Twitter) growth platform for scheduling tweets, AI-assisted writing, and tracking audience growth analytics.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: TweetHunter helps X/Twitter creators schedule posts, write with AI, and grow their audience with analytics and CRM tools.

features.title: Viral tweet library
features.description: Access a searchable library of 12M+ high-performing tweets for content inspiration.

features.title: AI writing assistant
features.description: AI-generated tweets, tweet rewriting, and thread hooks/ideas on the Grow plan and above.

features.title: Auto DM automation
features.description: Send automated direct messages based on engagement, with monthly limits by plan.

features.title: Evergreen tweet recycling
features.description: Reschedule and repost evergreen tweets automatically to keep a feed active.

features.title: X Analytics
features.description: Track follower growth and identify top-performing tweets over time.

features.title: X CRM
features.description: Build audience lists and import contacts from tweet interactions for relationship tracking.

pros: Large library of proven tweet templates for inspiration
AI writing tools for drafting and rewriting tweets and threads
Detailed X analytics and follower growth tracking
Multiple X accounts supported on paid plans
cons: No free plan, only a 7-day free trial
AI writing features are excluded from the entry-level Discover plan
Enterprise tier pricing reaches $200/month

faqs.question: Does TweetHunter offer a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 7-day free trial is available on all plans.

faqs.question: Is AI writing included on every plan?
faqs.answer: AI-written tweets, rewriting, and thread ideas start on the Grow plan; the Discover plan does not include them.

faqs.question: How many X accounts can I manage?
faqs.answer: Discover includes 1 account, Grow includes 5, and Enterprise includes unlimited accounts.

faqs.question: What is the auto-DM feature?
faqs.answer: TweetHunter can send automated DMs based on engagement, ranging from 3,000/month on Discover to 15,000/month on Enterprise.

use_cases.title: Growing a personal X following
use_cases.description: Schedule content, use AI writing help, and track follower growth from one dashboard.

use_cases.title: Ghostwriting for multiple clients
use_cases.description: Manage several X accounts and use the built-in CRM to track engagement per client.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is TweetHunter?
paragraphs: TweetHunter is a growth platform built specifically for X (formerly Twitter), combining a large library of high-performing tweets, AI-assisted writing, scheduling, and analytics into one dashboard.
It also includes CRM-style tools for building targeted follower lists and automation features like auto-DMs and evergreen tweet recycling.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who TweetHunter is for
paragraphs: It suits individual creators and brands trying to grow an X following, as well as ghostwriters and agencies managing multiple client accounts from a single login.

name: Blackmagic
skip_reason: The official site now shows only a shutdown notice: 'BlackMagic is shutting down on July 1, 2026,' with no product, feature, or pricing information available to verify.

enrichment.short_description: AI-powered social media platform for generating, scheduling, and automating content publishing across 11+ channels.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: FeedHive uses AI to generate and schedule social content, automate publishing workflows, and manage a unified social inbox.

features.title: AI content generation
features.description: A 'Vibe Marketing' agent turns ideas into ready-to-post content matching brand tone.

features.title: Multi-platform publishing
features.description: Publish to Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, X, TikTok, LinkedIn, Pinterest, Google Business, Threads, and Discord.

features.title: Automation workflows
features.description: A visual builder creates custom content pipelines with monthly automation-run limits.

features.title: AI image generation
features.description: Generate post images using Flux Pro and Nano Banana 2 models.

features.title: Social inbox
features.description: Manage engagement and comments across connected channels in one place.

features.title: Public API and MCP server
features.description: A public REST API and an official MCP server support developer and AI-agent integrations.

pros: Wide platform coverage across 11+ networks
AI content and image generation included in every plan
Automation workflow builder for repeatable publishing pipelines
Public API and MCP server for developer integrations
cons: No free plan, only a 7-day free trial
AI credits and automation runs are metered and capped per plan
Entry Creator plan is limited to 4 social accounts

faqs.question: Does FeedHive have a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, but a 7-day free trial is offered on all plans.

faqs.question: What AI models power FeedHive's image generation?
faqs.answer: Flux Pro and Nano Banana 2.

faqs.question: Can I automate publishing workflows?
faqs.answer: Yes, through a visual automation builder with monthly automation-run limits per plan.

faqs.question: Does FeedHive have an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, it offers a public REST API and an official MCP server.

use_cases.title: AI-assisted content scheduling
use_cases.description: Generate on-brand posts and images with AI, then schedule them across multiple networks.

use_cases.title: Multi-brand agency management
use_cases.description: Use separate workspaces and higher account limits to manage several client brands.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is FeedHive?
paragraphs: FeedHive is a social media automation platform that uses AI to generate captions and images, then schedules and publishes them across more than a dozen social channels.
It adds a visual automation builder for custom content pipelines, a unified social inbox, and a public API/MCP server for programmatic access.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who FeedHive is for
paragraphs: It fits marketers and teams who want AI to help draft content at scale, from solo creators on the Creator plan up to agencies managing many brand workspaces on the Agency plan.

enrichment.short_description: Unified social media management platform for AI content creation, scheduling, analytics, and team collaboration across multiple networks.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: ContentStudio combines AI content creation, scheduling, a unified inbox, and analytics for managing social media across multiple networks.

features.title: AI Studio
features.description: Built-in AI from Claude and OpenAI generates captions, hashtags, and images using Flux and Qwen models.

features.title: Content calendar
features.description: Multi-view scheduling calendar with approval workflows for team review.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.description: Manage comments, DMs, and mentions from multiple platforms in one place.

features.title: Analytics and competitor insights
features.description: Track performance and benchmark against competitors on Advanced plans and up.

features.title: Content discovery
features.description: An RSS feed reader and curation tools help find and reshare relevant content.

features.title: API access
features.description: API access is included starting on the Standard plan.

pros: Supports many networks including Bluesky and Threads
AI content generation for text and images built in
Unified inbox consolidates comments and DMs across channels
API access included even on the entry Standard plan
cons: Entry Standard plan is limited to 5 social accounts and 1 user
Enterprise tier requires a custom quote
Extra social accounts and users cost additional monthly add-on fees

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: No, but a 7-day free trial is offered without requiring a credit card.

faqs.question: What AI does ContentStudio use?
faqs.answer: Built-in AI from Claude and OpenAI, plus image generation via Flux and Qwen.

faqs.question: Does ContentStudio have an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, API access is included starting on the Standard plan.

faqs.question: Which networks are supported?
faqs.answer: Facebook, Instagram, X, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, Pinterest, Google Business Profile, Bluesky, Threads, and Telegram.

use_cases.title: Multi-brand content planning
use_cases.description: Plan, create, and schedule a month of content across several social accounts from one calendar.

use_cases.title: Agency client management
use_cases.description: Use white-label reporting and dedicated account management on higher tiers to serve multiple clients.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is ContentStudio?
paragraphs: ContentStudio is a social media management platform that combines AI-assisted content creation, a shared content calendar, a unified inbox, and analytics for managing multiple networks from one dashboard.
It also offers content discovery via RSS feeds and integrations with Zapier, n8n, Make, Canva, and cloud storage services.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who ContentStudio is for
paragraphs: It serves solo creators and small businesses on the Standard plan up through agencies and enterprises that need white-label reporting, client management, and custom API/SSO access.

enrichment.short_description: Social media management platform for publishing, unified inbox engagement, team approvals, and analytics across multiple channels.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Statusbrew offers social publishing, a unified inbox, approval workflows, and 230+ analytics metrics starting at $69/month.

features.title: Publishing and scheduling
features.description: Schedule and auto-publish Reels, Shorts, Stories, Threads, and Polls with shareable calendars.

features.title: Approval workflows
features.description: Streamline content review with team and client approval steps before publishing.

features.title: AI-powered composer
features.description: Generate captions and hashtags with an AI composer.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.description: Auto-route messages by intent, auto-moderate spam/negative comments, and manage reviews across locations.

features.title: Analytics and reporting
features.description: 230+ customizable metrics with 18 months of data backfill and lifetime retention, plus automated report scheduling.

features.title: CRM integrations
features.description: Connects with Salesforce and HubSpot on higher tiers.

pros: Deep analytics with 230+ metrics and 18-month data backfill
Unified inbox with auto-routing and auto-moderation across channels
CRM integrations with Salesforce and HubSpot on higher tiers
SOC 2 Type 2 and GDPR compliant
cons: Exact prices for the Lite, Standard, and Premium tiers are not published and require checking out or contacting sales
SSO, full API access, and MCP support are reserved for the custom Enterprise plan
Agency pricing is charged per client, starting at $49/mo/client

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, a 14-day free trial with no credit card required.

faqs.question: What is the starting price?
faqs.answer: Plans start at $69 per month.

faqs.question: Does Statusbrew support AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, it includes an AI-powered composer and MCP support for connecting Claude/ChatGPT.

faqs.question: Is Statusbrew compliant with data regulations?
faqs.answer: Yes, it is SOC 2 Type 2 and GDPR compliant.

use_cases.title: Multi-location brand management
use_cases.description: Manage publishing, reviews, and engagement across many locations from one dashboard.

use_cases.title: Agency client servicing
use_cases.description: Run per-client workspaces with shareable calendars and approval workflows.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Statusbrew?
paragraphs: Statusbrew is a social media management platform covering publishing, an AI-assisted composer, a unified inbox for engagement, and analytics with 230+ metrics.
It also offers CRM integrations, approval workflows, and compliance certifications (SOC 2 Type 2, GDPR) aimed at larger teams.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Statusbrew is for
paragraphs: It targets small businesses through enterprise and franchise organizations that need multi-location publishing, review management, and detailed reporting.

name: Crowdfire
skip_reason: The official site announces Crowdfire has pivoted away from being a social media management tool into 'a media platform dedicated to covering the intersection of social media, Web3, and AI' with no product, feature, or pricing information for the original tool remaining.

enrichment.short_description: Social media scheduler that repurposes an evergreen content library and auto-publishes to 10 networks with an AI caption assistant.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: MeetEdgar recycles evergreen posts and auto-publishes to 10 social networks, with an AI assistant for captions and hashtags.

features.title: Content library and repurposing
features.description: Stores posts in a reusable library and automatically recycles evergreen content.

features.title: Multi-platform publishing
features.description: Publish simultaneously across 10 networks including TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, and Bluesky.

features.title: AI assistant (Inky)
features.description: Generates captions and hashtags to help draft posts faster.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Real-time performance tracking with content optimization recommendations.

features.title: Social inbox
features.description: Engagement and community management tools for incoming interactions.

pros: Automatically repurposes and recycles evergreen posts, reducing manual re-posting
AI assistant (Inky) generates captions and hashtags
Supports 10 major networks including Bluesky and YouTube Shorts
30-day free trial with no upfront payment
cons: No free plan, a subscription is required after the trial
Inky AI credits are limited to 15-50 per month depending on plan
Weekly automation runs are capped (10 on Eddie, 1,000 on EDGAR)

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, 30 days with no payment required upfront.

faqs.question: What does Inky do?
faqs.answer: Inky is MeetEdgar's AI assistant that generates captions and hashtags for posts.

faqs.question: How many social accounts can I connect?
faqs.answer: The Eddie plan includes 5 accounts and the EDGAR plan includes 25, with paid add-ons available beyond that.

faqs.question: Which platforms does MeetEdgar support?
faqs.answer: TikTok, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Pinterest, Google Business Profile, X/Twitter, Threads, YouTube Shorts, and Bluesky.

use_cases.title: Automating evergreen content reuse
use_cases.description: Keep a content library recycling automatically so accounts stay active without manual re-posting.

use_cases.title: Small team scheduling
use_cases.description: Schedule and repurpose content across up to 25 accounts with shared team access.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is MeetEdgar?
paragraphs: MeetEdgar is a social media scheduling tool built around a reusable content library: posts are stored and automatically recycled so accounts stay active without constantly creating new content.
It publishes across 10 networks and includes an AI assistant called Inky for generating captions and hashtags.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who MeetEdgar is for
paragraphs: It's aimed at busy freelancers, solo entrepreneurs, and small teams who want evergreen content to keep circulating automatically rather than manually re-scheduling posts.

enrichment.short_description: Social media scheduling platform with recurring content libraries, client approval workflows, and white-label reporting.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: RecurPost schedules recurring social content, offers client approval links, and provides white-label reports starting at $9/month.

features.title: Recurring content library
features.description: Reuse and recycle evergreen posts on a repeating schedule instead of recreating content.

features.title: AI-assisted composition
features.description: ChatGPT integration and AI image generation help compose posts.

features.title: Client approval workflows
features.description: Password-free account connections with shareable approval links for clients.

features.title: Bulk scheduling
features.description: Import posts in bulk via CSV alongside recurring content libraries.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.description: Consolidates comments and messages from connected platforms.

features.title: White-label reports
features.description: Branded, recurring analytics reports for client-facing agencies.

pros: Low entry price starting at $9/month
Recurring content library reduces repetitive scheduling work
Client approval links that don't require sharing account passwords
Supports 10 platforms including Bluesky and Threads
cons: Entry Starter plan is limited to 2 accounts and 1 user
White-label reporting and client workspaces are reserved for the Agency tier and above
Enterprise plan requires a custom, sales-assisted setup

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, 14 days with no credit card required.

faqs.question: Does RecurPost use AI?
faqs.answer: Yes, ChatGPT integration for post composition and AI image generation.

faqs.question: How many platforms does RecurPost support?
faqs.answer: 10, including Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, Google Business Profile, Pinterest, TikTok, YouTube, Threads, and Bluesky.

use_cases.title: Recurring content scheduling
use_cases.description: Keep a library of evergreen posts cycling automatically across accounts.

use_cases.title: Client approval management
use_cases.description: Let clients approve scheduled posts via shareable links without needing account access.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is RecurPost?
paragraphs: RecurPost is a social media management platform, founded in 2016, that schedules recurring evergreen content and adds client approval workflows and white-label reporting for agencies.
It supports 10 networks and includes ChatGPT-based composition help plus bulk CSV import for scheduling at scale.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who RecurPost is for
paragraphs: It fits freelance social media managers and small businesses on lower tiers, and agencies managing multiple clients on the Agency and Enterprise plans.

enrichment.short_description: Social media scheduling tool with a content calendar, approval workflows, unified inbox, and link-in-bio pages.
enrichment.starting_price: Free plan available; paid plans from $15/month
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Pallyy offers a free social media scheduling plan plus paid tiers with approval workflows, a unified inbox, and link-in-bio pages.

features.title: Content calendar
features.description: Plan, approve, schedule, and publish content across channels from one calendar.

features.title: Approval workflows
features.description: Team members can review and approve posts before publishing.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Generate performance reports without needing spreadsheets.

features.title: Unified inbox
features.description: Manage comments, messages, and reviews from connected channels in one place.

features.title: Link in bio
features.description: Branded landing pages for turning a single bio link into a content hub.

pros: Free plan available with 15 posts/month and 1 social account
Simple single content calendar for approvals and scheduling
Supports 10 networks including Bluesky and Threads
Affordable entry paid tier at $15/month
cons: Free plan is limited to 1 social account and 200MB storage
Higher tiers are needed for multiple team members or additional social sets
No AI features mentioned on the site

faqs.question: Does Pallyy have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, a free plan with 15 posts/month and 1 social account.

faqs.question: Where is Pallyy based?
faqs.answer: Australia, operated by Pallyy PTY LTD.

faqs.question: Can I cancel anytime?
faqs.answer: Yes, users can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime without penalty.

use_cases.title: Free social scheduling
use_cases.description: Schedule a small volume of posts to one account at no cost.

use_cases.title: Client approval management
use_cases.description: Use approval workflows and multiple social sets to manage several clients.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Pallyy?
paragraphs: Pallyy, founded in 2019 in Australia, is a social media management tool offering a content calendar, approval workflows, a unified inbox, and link-in-bio pages.
It supports 10 networks and includes a free plan alongside paid tiers for agencies and larger teams.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Pallyy is for
paragraphs: It fits small businesses and solo users on the free plan, and agencies and brands needing approval workflows and multiple social sets on paid tiers.

enrichment.short_description: AI marketing platform that generates ad creatives, videos, and social content from prompts or product links, and schedules posts.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Predis.ai generates AI ad creatives, videos, and social posts from text or product links, with scheduling and analytics.

features.title: AI ad generation
features.description: Create static creatives, video ads, UGC-style content, and bulk variations from a prompt, product link, or image.

features.title: Multi-platform support
features.description: Publish and schedule across Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, and Pinterest.

features.title: Content calendar
features.description: Schedule posts with approval workflows and auto-posting on Rise and Enterprise+ plans.

features.title: Brand workspaces
features.description: Manage multiple brands with consistent brand application, up to unlimited on Enterprise+.

features.title: Analytics
features.description: Track performance and ROAS across campaigns.

features.title: Editing suite
features.description: Built-in editor with automatic resizing for different platform specs.

features.title: Multilingual output
features.description: Generate ad content in 19+ languages.

pros: Generates video and static ads from a single prompt or product link
Multi-brand workspace support on higher tiers
Shopify and 60+ channel integrations plus API access on every plan
Large user base (6.4M+) and strong review ratings across G2, Trustpilot, and Shopify
cons: Core plan has no auto-posting included
Credit-based system limits monthly generation volume
Enterprise+ tier is priced at $212/month

faqs.question: Does Predis.ai include auto-posting?
faqs.answer: Only on the Rise and Enterprise+ plans (2-3 auto posts/day per brand); the Core plan has no auto posting.

faqs.question: What AI models does Predis.ai use?
faqs.answer: Google's Veo, Nano Banana Pro, Minimax, Gemini, and ByteDance's Seedance, combined with proprietary models.

faqs.question: Does Predis.ai have an API?
faqs.answer: Yes, API access is included on all plans.

faqs.question: How many languages does Predis.ai support?
faqs.answer: 19+ languages for generated content.

use_cases.title: Ad creative generation from product links
use_cases.description: Turn a product URL into ready-to-use ad creatives and videos.

use_cases.title: Bulk ad variation production
use_cases.description: Generate multiple ad variations across brands for client campaigns.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Predis.ai?
paragraphs: Predis.ai is an AI marketing platform that generates advertising creatives, video ads, and social posts from text prompts, product links, or images, then lets users schedule and publish them across multiple platforms.
It includes brand workspaces, an editing suite, competitor analysis, and API access with Shopify and 60+ channel integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Predis.ai is for
paragraphs: It's used by e-commerce store owners, content creators, and digital agencies that need to quickly produce ad creatives and social content without a dedicated design team.
